Z3 commit message: Rename lcube identifiers to largest_cube

Rename find_lcube and the other *lcube* identifiers (m_lcube_period,
should_find_lcube, settings members and accessors, statistics counters,
the unit test file/command) to *largest_cube*. The external names are
unchanged: the lp.lcube and lp.lcube_flips parameters in
lp_params_helper.pyg and the arith-lcube-* statistics display names.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Fable 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
